title: MOSSEL BAY FIRES: No active fire, wind prediction of 30 km/h monitored
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS & VIDEO - Although there...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS & VIDEO - Although there are still no active fires reported, Mossel Bay teams remain on alert as winds of up to 30km/h are expected.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS & VIDEO - Although there are still no active fires reported, Mossel Bay teams remain on alert as winds of up to 30km/h are expected."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At 07:30 this morning, Saturday, 10 January, the Mossel Bay Municipality said fire crews continued operations throughout the night in the fire affected areas.","html":"At 07:30 this morning, Saturday, 10 January, the Mossel Bay Municipality said fire crews continued operations throughout the night in the fire affected areas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO: Aftermath of Mossel Bay fires as seen from the air","html":"VIDEO: Aftermath of Mossel Bay fires as seen from the air"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The Joint Operations Centre, coordinating the collaborative multi-agency firefighting operations was closed down yesterday after the final briefing at 16:00, but operations continued in the field mopping up and attending to hotspots.”","html":"“The Joint Operations Centre, coordinating the collaborative multi-agency firefighting operations was closed down yesterday after the final briefing at 16:00, but operations continued in the field mopping up and attending to hotspots.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It said the fire remains contained and under control. The night shift continued with mopping-up operations throughout the night at Vakansieplaas/Island View.","html":"It said the fire remains contained and under control. The night shift continued with mopping-up operations throughout the night at Vakansieplaas/Island View."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Aalwyndal Road, the west, north and eastern lines remain cold with no activity. Extensive mopping-up operations continue throughout today.”","html":"“Aalwyndal Road, the west, north and eastern lines remain cold with no activity. Extensive mopping-up operations continue throughout today.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There fire team still includes a multi-agency collaboration between the Garden Route District Municipality, Working on Fire and Mossel Bay Municipality.","html":"There fire team still includes a multi-agency collaboration between the Garden Route District Municipality, Working on Fire and Mossel Bay Municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO: Mopping up operations after Mossel Bay fire","html":"VIDEO: Mopping up operations after Mossel Bay fire"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video: Mossel Bay Municipality","html":"Video: Mossel Bay Municipality"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
